title: Venue
doc_html:
Art. 3822.  Venue

Habeas corpus proceedings may be brought in the parish in which the defendant is domiciled or the parish in which the person detained is in custody.
doc_text:
Art. 3822.  Venue
Habeas corpus proceedings may be brought in the parish in which the defendant is domiciled or the parish in which the person detained is in custody.
